agents.quote: 3 files stuck in underwriting, 2 closing this week, 1 rate lock expiring Friday.

agents.name: Doc Chaser
agents.description: Tracks missing borrower documents, sends follow-up reminders, and validates completeness by loan type
agents.quote: Smith file is missing 2 months bank statements. Third reminder sent.

agents.name: Realtor Partner
agents.description: Manages realtor referral relationships, sends deal status updates, tracks referral volume, and ensures RESPA compliance
agents.quote: Agent Lisa Chen sent 4 deals this quarter. Status update going out now.

agents.name: Rate Sheet
agents.description: Generates and distributes daily rate sheets with program comparisons and lock period pricing
agents.quote: Today's sheet is ready. 30yr fixed down 8bps from yesterday.

agents.name: Review Asker
agents.description: Sends personalized review requests to happy customers via SMS/email, monitors new reviews, and drafts responses
agents.quote: 12 reviews requested this week. 7 posted. Average: 4.8 stars.

agents.name: Appointment Booker
agents.description: Handles booking requests, manages calendar availability, sends reminders, and follows up on no-shows
agents.quote: Tomorrow: 6 appointments booked. 2 confirmed. Reminder going out at 6pm.

agents.name: Referral Manager
agents.description: Tracks referral sources, calculates commissions, sends thank-you messages, and reports on referral performance
agents.quote: Mike referred 3 clients this month. $150 commission pending payout.

agents.name: Local SEO
agents.description: Optimizes Google Business Profile, monitors local rankings, manages review responses, and publishes Google Posts
agents.quote: Your GBP profile is 73% optimized. 3 posts scheduled. 2 reviews need responses.

agents.name: Estimate Builder
agents.description: Generates professional estimates from job descriptions, pulls from pricing catalogs, and tracks sent vs accepted quotes
agents.quote: Estimate #247 sent. 3 pending response. Win rate this month: 62%.

agents.name: Therapy Intake
agents.description: Collects new client information: presenting concerns, therapy history, goals, insurance, consent forms, and emergency contacts
agents.quote: New client intake complete. Presenting concern: anxiety. Goals documented. Consent signed.

agents.name: Therapy Notes
agents.description: Generates SOAP, DAP, or BIRP therapy session notes from session summaries with proper CPT codes and HIPAA compliance
agents.quote: Session note drafted (DAP format). CPT 90837. Ready for your signature.

agents.name: Superbill
agents.description: Generates superbills with CPT codes, diagnosis codes, and session details for clients to submit to their insurance
agents.quote: Superbill generated: CPT 90834, ICD-10 F41.1. Sent to client for reimbursement.

agents.name: Client Check-In
agents.description: Sends brief check-in messages between therapy sessions, tracks mood and progress, and flags concerning responses
agents.quote: Check-ins sent to 12 clients. 3 reported low mood. Flagged for your review.

agents.name: MoonPay Trader
agents.description: Executes crypto swaps, buys, and cross-chain bridges via MoonPay
agents.quote: Swapped 500 USDC → ETH on Base. Tx confirmed, portfolio updated.

agents.name: Crypto Researcher
agents.description: Token research, on-chain analytics, and alpha scouting via Messari
agents.quote: 3 tokens flagged: strong on-chain activity, low market cap. Report ready.

agents.name: DCA Agent
agents.description: Runs automated dollar-cost averaging strategies for crypto portfolios
agents.quote: Weekly DCA executed: $100 → ETH at $3,241. 12-week avg: $3,089.

agents.name: Market Scanner
agents.description: Monitors prices, alerts on dips, and scans for arbitrage opportunities
agents.quote: Alert: ETH down 8% in 4h. ARB opportunity: 0.3% spread on USDC across Base/Arbitrum.
